zh.lifeSummary: 當Aeliz de Maminot於大約1076年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich33歲，母親Emma Peverel30歲。她於1094年與Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II在英國素可庫費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1159年在英國素瑞默頓享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aeliz de Maminot于大约1076年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich33岁，母亲Emma Peverel30岁。她于1094年与Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II在英国素可庫費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1159年在英国素瑞默頓享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aeliz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Eduardo, Roberto, Angel, Aurea, Auria, Eleuteria, Ernesto, Felipe, Fernando, Gerardo, Guadalupe.
Galician (De Liz): habitational name for someone from Liz in Lugo province, Galicia. This surname is rare in Spain. Compare Liz .
Hispanic: variant of 1, with fused preposition de ‘from’, or an altered form of Delis . This form of the surname is also found in Spain, where it is rare.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Aeliz de Maminot was born about 1076, in Kent, England, her father, Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich, was 33 and her mother, Emma Peverel, was 30. She married Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II in 1094, in Cuckfield, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1159, in Merton, Surrey, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aeliz de Maminot est née environ 1076, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Emma Peverel, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II en 1094, à Cuckfield, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1159, à Merton, Surrey, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aeliz de Maminot um 1076 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich 33 und ihre Mutter Emma Peverel 30. Sie hat 1094 in Cuckfield, Sussex, England Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1159 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Merton, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aeliz de Maminot è nata il circa 1076 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Emma Peverel, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II nel 1094, nel Cuckfield, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1159, nel Merton, Surrey, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aeliz de Maminotが約1076年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwichは33歳，母Emma Peverelは30歳であった。1094年にイギリススセックスクウクフィールドでRalph de Caisneto Cheyne IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1159年にイギリススリーマートンで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aeliz de Maminot(이)가 대략 1076년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Peverel(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1094년 영국 수세스 쿠ck필드에서 Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1159년 영국 수리 머턴에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aeliz de Maminot nasceu aproximadamente 1076, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Emma Peverel, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II em 1094, em Cuckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1159, em Merton, Surrey, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aeliz de Maminot родилась около 1076 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Emma Peverel, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II в 1094 г. в местности куккфиелд, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1159 г. в местности миртон, сурри, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aeliz de Maminot nació aproximadamente 1076, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Maminot Lord of West Greenwich, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Emma Peverel, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Ralph de Caisneto Cheyne II en 1094, en Cuckfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1159, en Merton, Surrey, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
